text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the triathlon has arrived...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is it! Tannhauser, you feeling A-OK?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Sorry I was out of action for a while, but thankfully I'm all healed
up now and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Today I mean business! Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's the spirit! But we don't want you getting any nosebleeds,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh... yeah, I forgot. Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Spe, you okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, I-I-I'm super nervous! How am I supposed to go out there like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If you're finding it hard to calm down, how about trying some
visualizations? For example, you could imagine winning the grand
prize and having the all-you-can-eat buffet!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! The buffet! Let's see, there's... seafood cocktail, roast
beef...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! There's all kinds of potatoes in the German cottage fries too!
And they've got acqua pazza...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that seems to have done the trick. Everyone, let's make sure we
get that buffet! We're in this to win it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I brim with delight when I imagine this auditorium packed with
spectators! Is everyone ready?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, uhhh... I-I-I guess... No! I always forget something. I-I'm just
gonna check one more time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We're all meeting at the venue, right? I'm heading off now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ah, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Um, thank you for doing the triathlon with me. I feel really glad that I
get to be on such a great team.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is this the time to be getting all soppy? We haven't competed yet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I know! I'll give it everything I've got! I promise I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're way too serious about this. It's not like it's your responsibility to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: It's not about responsibility. I want my running to make you all proud.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Ayabe, Top Road! We're going to head out now too. See you
there!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's win this together!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Warm spring sun and clear blue skies are here to welcome the
long-awaited Tracen Academy Team Triathlon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There are eight teams competing today, making for thirty-two
athletes in total. Our competitors are currently ready and waiting on
the academy grounds.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow! There's so many spectators! All this excitement's getting my
heart pounding!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Lots of television cameras, too! My father said he would be watching
from his office!

text_block_list.name: Shook Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the lineup on Team Bakushin is insane! What, are they going
all out for the special award or something?!

text_block_list.name: Naysayer Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, they have some total newbies on their team, though. It's nice
they wanna take part and all, but they better not get in the way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Keh heh heh... How exciting it is to think that all their jabbering will
turn into bitter cries of agony! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Quite! When the audience witnesses how I shatter the limits of
stamina, they will gasp in astonishment!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha!
Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita, I know we can hold our own out there. Just think—we put up a
good fight against our seniors in the joint training, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah... We even won!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We've proven we stand a chance. So let's hold our heads up high!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's be confident and go all out! We'll show them what we've
got!
